items.title: Epstein files: Yale bars David Gelernter from teaching classes amid review of emails
items.description: Former Harvard University President Larry Summers last fall stopped teaching classes there after fallout from his dealings with Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: Tariff bills across U.S. states mount as affordability and Trump head for midterm elections showdown
items.description: New data shows that states where key midterm elections races will take place paid over $134 billion in tariffs during 2025 as affordability issues mou...

items.title: SAVE Act: House to vote on Trump-backed voter ID bill
items.description: The SAVE America Act's GOP supporters say it would secure elections and prevent fraud. Democrats say it could disenfranchise millions.

items.title: Watch Pam Bondi hearing: AG touts record Dow as Democrats grill her over Trump, Epstein
items.description: Bondi's sworn testimony came after Rep. Jerrold Nadler, D-N.Y., slammed the DOJ for so far failing to indict any Jeffrey Epstein co-conspirators.

items.title: GOP defectors help spike House measure to block tariff disapproval votes
items.description: The House on Tuesday voted against language that would have blocked challenges to Trump's tariffs through the summer.
